name: Luna Gold Corp.
description: Luna Gold Corp. was a mineral exploration and development company primarily focused on the acquisition, exploration, and development of gold resources. The company was best known for its flagship Aurizona gold mine located in the Maranhão state of Brazil. Headquartered in Vancouver, British Columbia, Luna Gold operated as a publicly traded entity on the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX) under the ticker symbol LGC. The company specialized in advancing gold projects from exploration stages toward production, maintaining a strategic interest in the precious metals sector within South America before its eventual corporate restructuring and merger activities.
